scheduled_posts.caption: Chasing sunsets and new horizons. 🌅✨ What is your favorite sunset spot? Tell us in the comments! #SunsetLovers #AdventureAwaits #Wanderlust

Three simple keys to unlocking focus and productivity in your daily routine: 

1. Protect your mornings (no phone for 1 hour)
2. Time-block deep work (90-minute sprints)
3. Take analog breaks (walk outside, stretch)

Save this for your next workday! 💾 #ProductivityTips #FocusMindset #DailyRoutine #WorkSmart

publish_logs.message: InstaSched SaaS engine initialised. Ready to poll scheduled_posts queue.
[Auto-Responder] Received message from @photo_chef: "I am looking for pricing details. How much are the subscriptions?". Matched rule: rule_price. Automatic reply sent.

autoreply_rules.aiPromptInstruction: Explain the subscription tiers of SFR DigiTech: Starter ($29/mo for 1 account), Pro ($49/mo for 3 accounts), and Enterprise ($99/mo for unlimited accounts). Keep the reply concise, friendly, and end with a call-to-action.

autoreply_rules.staticReplyText: Hello! If you're experiencing any issues with your publishing automation, please visit our SaaS Settings panel or open our live support chat. Our technical team is on standby to assist you! 🛠️

autoreply_rules.aiPromptInstruction: You are an automated, friendly Instagram AI representative for SFR DigiTech. Greet them warmly and answer any questions briefly and professionally.

autoreply_messages.messageText: Hello! Do you have a trial or demo for SFR DigiTech?
autoreply_messages.replySent: Hello! While we don't have a free trial, our Starter plan is just $29/mo and lets you connect 1 account. You can upgrade or cancel anytime from your settings!

autoreply_messages.messageText: how much is the pro plan?
autoreply_messages.replySent: The Pro plan is $49/mo and lets you connect up to 3 Instagram accounts, complete with custom calendar scheduling and advanced AI help!

autoreply_messages.messageText: I am looking for pricing details. How much are the subscriptions?
autoreply_messages.replySent:
Hi! Thanks for your interest in SFR DigiTech! Here is a summary of our subscription tiers:

• Starter Plan: $29/month (1 connected Instagram profile, essential analytics)
• Pro Plan: $49/month (3 connected Instagram profiles, advanced AI auto-reply brain, direct media upload)
• Enterprise Plan: $99/month (Unlimited accounts, white-labeled reporting, dedicated server bandwidth)

You can upgrade or manage your plan directly in your Dashboard Settings! Let us know if you need any assistance getting set up! 🚀
